Standards vary by dwelling type. Listed values are single-family detached: lot 7,000 sf, width 50 ft, front 20 ft, side 10 ft each, rear 25 ft, height 30 ft. Single-family attached: lot 3,500 sf, width 25 ft, side 0 ft attached/10 ft unattached. Multiple dwelling: lot 7,000 sf, 1,750 sf per DU.
Min lot area 7,000 sf. Min land area per individual dwelling 1,750 sf. Side setbacks 10 ft each. Max height 36 ft. Min distance between main buildings 20 ft.

Uses can be vertically mixed. Listed values = single-family detached residential standards (lot 3,000 sf, width 40 ft, front 10 ft living/20 ft front-garage, interior side 5 ft, rear 25 ft, height 30 ft). Non-SFD standards: no min lot area/width, front 15 ft, height 40 ft (30 ft within 100 ft of SF residence).

Uses vertically mixed. Min lot area/width: None (TBD). Front 15 ft. Side: none except 15 ft abutting rural/residential. Rear: none except for loading/trash. Max height 65 ft (50 ft within 100 ft of any district except AC-3).

Uses vertically mixed. Min lot area/width: None (TBD). Front 15 ft. Side: none except 15 ft abutting rural/residential. Rear: none except for loading/trash. Max height 100 ft (75 ft within 100 ft of AC-2; 50 ft within 100 ft of any other district).

zones.zone_name: MHP-435 Manufactured Home Park Zoning District
zones.notes: Park-level: min lot area 10 acres (435,600 sf), front 15 ft, side 10 ft each, rear 10 ft, height 30 ft. Per-space: min space area 4,000 sf, width 45 ft.

zones.zone_name: PM/RVP-435 Park Model/Recreational Vehicle Park Zoning District
zones.notes: Overall park: min lot area 10 acres (435,600 sf), front 15 ft, side 10 ft each, rear 10 ft, height 30 ft. Per-space: 2,000 sf (park model)/1,500 sf (RV).

zones.zone_name: MP-CMP Multi-Purpose Community Master Plan Zoning District
zones.notes: Floating district for large multi-purpose developments. No fixed dimensional standards in code; standards set per approved master plan and development agreement (all TBD). Minimum land requirement is 1,000 contiguous acres (project minimum, not a lot size). Industrial uses set back >=660 ft from exterior residential.

zones.zone_name: L-MPC Large Master Plan Community Zoning District
zones.notes: Floating district for large master planned communities. No fixed dimensional standards in code; standards set per approved master plan and development agreement (all TBD). Minimum land requirement is 2,000 contiguous gross acres (project minimum, not a lot size). Min 18% open space.
